name: DEML App
notes: Paste sitemaps into Algolia Crawler → DEML App → Configuration → sitemaps.
Algolia auto-discovers /sitemap.xml from the start URL domain; explicit URLs are required when using sitemap-index or cross-domain feeds.
After deploy, run Recrawl from the Crawler overview.
Domain verification meta: algolia-site-verification in index.html (687B59B29612DE68).
